arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 CoIP pool.

id.description: The unique identifier for the EC2 CoIP pool.

local_gateway_route_table_id.description: The ID of the local gateway route table associated with the CoIP pool.

pool_cidrs.description: A set of CIDR blocks associated with the CoIP pool.

pool_id.description: The ID of the CoIP pool.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the CoIP pool.
